Video.summary: Rob and Laura are unaware that their teenage babysitter has a crush on Laura.
Video.title: The Lady and the Baby Sitter

Image.alt: The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter

Video.summary: Rob's friendship with Jerry is almost destroyed in a feud over a neighbor's crabgrass.
Video.title: A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat

Image.alt: A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat

Video.summary: Sally Rogers is romanced by her "secret" admirer -- the owner of Monker's Delicatessen.
Video.title: Romance, Roses and Rye Bread

Video.summary: Rob and Laura are on their way to visit the doctor when they are trapped in a stalled elevator.
Rob puts his job at risk when he convinces Alan Brady to host a cultural documentary program.
Video.title: Three Letters from One Wife

Video.summary: Laura takes two of Millie's prescription pills and suffers disastrous side effects.
Video.title: Pink Pills and Purple Parents

Video.summary: Rob struggles to hide his flu symptoms at a family party rather.
Video.title: The Death of the Party

Video.summary: Rob is once again forced to thwart another scheme of his old but manipulative friend, Neil Schenk.
Video.title: Stretch Petrie vs. Kid Schenk

Video.summary: Rob receives a ransom demand of $2,500 for his lost television script.
Video.title: Brother, Can You Spare $2500?

Video.summary: Rob's younger brother involves Sally Rogers in a romantic Waterloo.
Video.title: Stacey Petrie: Part I

Video.summary: Stacey Petrie tries to save his new business from closing and his romance from ending.
Video.title: Stacey Petrie: Part II

Video.summary: Rob agrees to have a popular British singing duo spend the night at his home.
Video.title: The Redcoats Are Coming

Video.summary: Buddy and Rob run a shoe store they've invested in after chasing off its only full-time salesman.
Video.title: Young Man with a Shoehorn

Video.summary: Rob and Laura are in a quandary over how Ritchie can protect himself from a girl.
Video.title: Girls Will Be Boys

Video.summary: Rob recalls the time he and Jerry tried to buy the same house.
Video.title: Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home

Image.alt: Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home

Video.summary: Sally's new boyfriend is secretive about what he does for a living.
Video.title: Anthony Stone

Video.summary: Rob and Laura have no choice but to wear gloves to an important community banquet.
Video.title: Show of Hands

Video.summary: Alan needs Rob's help improving a script for his Broadway debut.
Video.title: Baby Fat

Video.summary: Rob buys a motorcycle and is arrested as a joy-riding delinquent.
Video.title: Br-rooom, Br-rooom

Video.summary: Laura blurts out an embarrassing secret on a national television quiz show.
Video.title: Coast to Coast Big Mouth

Video.summary: Rob, Laura, Sally and Buddy spend a frightening night in a haunted cabin at a mountain resort.
Video.title: The Ghost of A. Chantz

Video.summary: The "Alan Brady" writers entertain at a prison and Rob gets locked up with the inmates.
Video.title: The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail

Image.alt: The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail

Video.summary: Rob, Sally and Buddy go on big ego trips when a national magazine wants to do a story about them.
Video.title: My Two Showoffs and Me

Video.summary: Millie and Laura become two terrible stage-mothers when Rob agrees to hire Ritchie for a commercial.
Video.title: Boy #1, Boy #2

Video.summary: Rob learns that a song he helped write is about to become a hit.
Video.title: Bupkis

Video.summary: Rob recalls his first meeting with Alan Brady during a stay-awake marathon for his disc-jockey job.
Video.title: One Hundred Terrible Hours

Video.summary: Rob sees a flying saucer but nobody believes him.
Video.title: Uhny Uftz

Video.summary: Rob and Laura try to find a permanent home for an ugly dog from the pound.
Video.title: The Ugliest Dog in the World

Image.alt: The Ugliest Dog in the World
The Ugliest Dog in the World
The Ugliest Dog in the World
The Ugliest Dog in the World
The Ugliest Dog in the World
The Ugliest Dog in the World
The Ugliest Dog in the World
The Ugliest Dog in the World
The Ugliest Dog in the World

Video.summary: Rob and Laura recall their courtship days, when Rob almost lost Laura to another man.
Video.title: No Rice at My Wedding

Video.summary: Rob almost earns $500 because the freckles on his back are in the shape of the Liberty Bell.
Video.title: Odd But True

Video.summary: Bullfighter becomes a handyman.
Video.title: Viva Petrie

Video.summary: Rob and Laura find out that Ritchie has been telling stories in school.
Video.title: Go Tell the Birds and the Bees

Image.alt: Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees

Video.summary: Rob goes out to cool off after a quarrel with Laura and winds up in trouble.
Video.title: You're Under Arrest

Video.summary: Rob recalls the time he was out of work with a new home, no furniture and a pregnant wife.
Video.title: Fifty-Two, Forty-Five or Work

Video.summary: Laura gives Rob an expensive watch at his birthday party, but the watch goes missing.
Video.title: Who Stole My Watch

Video.summary: Rob agrees to run for office but realizes he'd prefer to vote for his brainy opponent.
Video.title: The Making of a Councilman

Video.summary: Rob sets out to write a book during his vacation but has trouble getting started.
Video.title: A Farewell to Writing

Video.summary: Rob's dreams of inheriting a fortune seem dashed when he gets an old desk.
Video.title: The Great Petrie Fortune

Video.summary: Rob and Laura clash over which of them is the better writer of a children's story.
Video.title: See Rob Write, Write Rob Write

Image.alt: See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write

Video.summary: A scratch on Rob's new car causes a domestic crisis at the Petrie house.
Video.title: Scratch My Car and Die

Video.summary: Rob attempts to coax a legendary radio star out of retirement for a TV special.
Video.title: The Return of Edwin Carp

Video.summary: Rob goes to see an old Army buddy's nightclub act and winds up spending the night in jail.
Video.title: Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail

Image.alt: Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail
Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail
Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail
Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail

Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail
Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail
Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail

Video.summary: Fearing he may be going bald, Rob tries a barber's secret recipe.
Video.title: I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All

Image.alt: I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All

Video.summary: Rob is skeptical when Laura's new writing teacher thinks she shows promise.
Video.title: Teacher's Petrie

Video.summary: Rob and Laura's parents compete to get the couple committed to their respective cemetery plots.
Video.title: The Plots Thicken

Video.summary: Rob and Laura suspect their neighbor Jerry is having an affair.
Video.title: My Neighbor's Husband's Other Life
